name: Bent-Over Lateral Raise
lead: Exercise for shoulders and trapezius muscles

instructions.starting position: Standing with knees slightly bent, bust bent forward, almost parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight and your head in line with your spine. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
instructions.execution: Slowly lift and move the dumbbells away from each side of your body in an arc with your arms. Contract for a moment in the raised position before returning to the initial position.
